description: B2B outbound: prospecting sequences, qualification, decision-maker mapping

items.name: ABM (Account-Based Marketing)
items.tactic: Identify 100 target accounts. Personalized multi-channel. Higher close rate.

items.name: MEDDICB Framework
items.tactic: Metrics, Economic Buyer, Decision criteria, Decision process, Identify pain, Champions, Budget

items.name: Follow-up Sequences (5-7 touches)
items.tactic: Email → call → email → LinkedIn → email → value add → email. Persistence = reply.
